No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus supports a connection to eradicating poverty or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3), develops practical language skills (Target 4.4), and fosters cultural understanding and an international perspective, aligning with global citizenship and cultural diversity (Target 4.7).
